name: LBank Crypto Exchange API
what_it_does: Hong Kong-based cryptocurrency exchange with REST and WebSocket API — enabling traders and developers to access spot trading (400+ altcoin pairs), market data, order management, and account operations, with RSA signature authentication (unusual for crypto exchanges) and focus on emerging altcoin and new project listings.
use_cases: Accessing altcoin market data via LBank API for cryptocurrency price tracking and order books
Executing spot trades via LBank API for altcoin-focused algorithmic trading strategies
Managing orders via LBank API for trading bot order lifecycle management
Streaming market data via LBank WebSocket for real-time trading applications
Fetching account data via LBank API for portfolio tracking across emerging altcoins
not_for: High-liquidity major pair trading (use Binance/Coinbase for BTC/ETH depth)
best_when: A developer or trader wants access to a wide selection of emerging altcoins and new token listings on an exchange that lists projects early, accepting the associated liquidity risk.
avoid_when: You need US compliance, top-tier liquidity, or the security of RSA key management is a concern.

auth.notes: RSA signature authentication (unusual for crypto — most use HMAC). Parameters: api_key, sign (RSA-SHA256 signature), timestamp. RSA: generate RSA key pair; submit public key to LBank; sign requests with private key. Sign target: sorted URL-encoded parameters. Timestamp: Unix milliseconds. REST API at api.lbank.com/v2/. WebSocket: wss://www.lbank.com/wss/v2/. Alternative: MD5 signature available but RSA recommended for security.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; spot trading: 0.1% standard maker/taker
pricing.paid_tiers: LBK token for fee discounts; VIP tiers by volume
pricing.notes: Hong Kong-based company. Founded 2015. One of the older altcoin-focused exchanges. LBK token: native exchange token for fee discounts. ~400+ trading pairs with heavy altcoin focus. Known for early listings of new altcoins and IEOs. RSA authentication: unique among crypto exchanges — adds key management complexity but stronger security. MD5 alternative: deprecated but may still be supported. US-restricted. KYC required for withdrawals. Reliability concerns: mid-tier exchange with historical API stability issues.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: RSA signature (NOT HMAC — unusual). Public key submission required. Sorted params for signing. MD5 alternative (deprecated). US-restricted. Hong Kong company. Altcoin focus. KYC for withdrawals.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: GET requests idempotent. Order placement: limited idempotency — check for duplicate orders via order status before retry. Market data reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: RSA signature (not HMAC) — generate RSA key pair, submit PUBLIC key to LBank, sign requests with PRIVATE key
RSA key management required: store private key securely (hardware security module recommended)
Sort parameters alphabetically before RSA signing — non-standard vs HMAC exchanges
MD5 alternative exists but is deprecated — do not use for new integrations
Altcoin focus: many listings have low liquidity and high volatility — use limit orders
US-restricted exchange — IP geoblocking may apply

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. RSA signature — stronger than HMAC (asymmetric crypto, only private key signs). Public key registration means LBank validates signatures without knowing private key. Private key is the ultimate secret — use HSM for production. MD5 deprecated — do not use. Hong Kong jurisdiction: outside major regulatory frameworks. Altcoin exchange: higher counterparty risk for new listings. No OAuth2. KYC for withdrawals.
